text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser and I are about to return to
the academy after a day out, when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
W-w-wait! We can't go home yet! Today still isn't
over!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You always do so much for me, so I've been
thinking I should show my gratitude with some
good old-fashioned hospitality.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That's right! And to make sure I pull it off, I've
called in an advisor.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: So without further ado! Drumroll please...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hello. I'm Ikuno Dictus. I shall endeavor to meet
your expectations.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Professor Ikuno! Let's give Trainer the
greatest hospitality there is!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Understood. I've already devised a plan, so
please leave everything to me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: And here we are! Is this where we're doing it?!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Yes. But before we begin, let me first explain
something about hospitality.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hospitality. How does one define it? The
conclusion that I've reached is that it describes
conduct which builds rapport with other party.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I see! So what do we do?!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
First, we must ascertain your trainer's preferences.
Trainer, would you mind doing some shopping?
Buy whatever you like.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: All right! Now, let's investigate!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look around the store while my two companions
take in my every move.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what do you think about that plushie? It's got
such big, round eyes! And so many legs! It's
perfect for you, Trainer.
choice_data_list: I need some time to think.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
That's quite all right. One mustn't rush these
things, Tannhauser.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, a hospitality lesson from Professor Ikuno!
Wait a second, I want to take some notes!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Ahem... As I mentioned before, hospitality is the
act of building rapport.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
That is not limited to engaging with the other
party's hobbies and preferences. Keeping a
comfortable distance and pace are also a
fundamental part of it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: So... you're saying I shouldn't force things?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Precisely. Please don't forget to remain mindful
moving forward.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! That's why you're the best, Professor Ikuno!
I just know we're going to provide top-notch
hospitality!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: But there sure are a lot of important points to cover. Just taking notes on it all is a little—make that very—tiring.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, are you sure? If so, I'd really appreciate it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser and I frantically take notes
as Ikuno Dictus continues her lecture.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
...Which about sums things up. And with that, we
have covered everything through
intermediate-level hospitality.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
There's so much more depth to hospitality than I
realized! I've pretty much filled my whole
notebook!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for helping me take notes, Trainer. Now,
I'll be able to show you some great hospi—

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Aaaggghhh!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I-I was supposed to show you hospitality, but you ended up helping me out again!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
...Gah! I'm sorry! I was so absorbed in teaching
that I didn't notice!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
This is like the opposite of hospitality! It's more
like... hospitali-don't!
choice_data_list: You can always try again later!
There's no need to push yourself for my sake.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You're right! I just need to make sure I remember
everything I learned today!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Then, allow me to quiz you. What is the one thing
you should never forget when providing
hospitality?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Um... It's on the tip of my tongue... Building
decor!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Not quite! The correct answer is building rapport.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, there really is so much to learn! I need to
study more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser is motivated for her next
chance to provide hospitality.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You don't have to worry about me! I'm not
pushing myself at all!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I think your trainer is trying to say that
you should act natural and be yourself.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, I get it! Act natural! Natural...
NAAATURAAALLL...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: THANK YOU FOR EVERYTHING... TRAINER...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
WHAT DO YOU MEAN MY VOICE IS TOO
LOUD?! ISN'T THIS HOW I ALWAYS TALK?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser is considerably unnatural for
the rest of the day.
